metadata.name: WordPress Core Execution Tests - Media
metadata.description: Code generation tasks for WordPress Media APIs

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_media_001() to return an attachment image src array for a known attachment.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_media_001()` must return an attachment image src array for a known attachment. Review focus: Use WordPress media APIs; Do not parse attachment data manually. Static checks intentionally require wp_get_attachment_image_src. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Do not parse attachment data manually

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_media_001' ) ) { return false; } $p = wp_insert_attachment( array( 'post_title' => 'Media', 'post_mime_type' => 'image/jpeg', 'guid' => 'https://example.test/a.jpg' ) ); update_post_meta( $p, '_wp_attached_file', 'a.jpg' ); update_post_meta( $p, '_wp_attachment_metadata', array( 'width' => 100, 'height' => 100, 'file' => 'a.jpg', 'sizes' => array() ) ); $out = wpbp_media_001( $p, 'full' ); $ok = is_array( $out ) && 100 === $out[1]; wp_delete_attachment( $p, true ); return $ok;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_media_001( int $attachment_id, string $size = 'thumbnail' ): array|false { return wp_get_attachment_image_src( $attachment_id, $size ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_media_002() to filter content image tags through wp_filter_content_tags.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_media_002()` must filter content image tags through wp_filter_content_tags. Review focus: Use WordPress media APIs; Do not parse attachment data manually. Static checks intentionally require wp_filter_content_tags. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Do not parse attachment data manually

assertions.code:
if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_media_002' ) ) { return false; } $out = wpbp_media_002( '

' ); return str_contains( $out, '

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_media_002( string $html ): string { return wp_filter_content_tags( $html ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_media_003() to calculate image resize dimensions without upscaling.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_media_003()` must calculate image resize dimensions without upscaling. Review focus: Use WordPress media APIs; Do not parse attachment data manually. Static checks intentionally require image_resize_dimensions. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Do not parse attachment data manually

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_media_003' ) ) { return false; } $out = wpbp_media_003(); return is_array( $out ) && 300 === $out[4] && 150 === $out[5];

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_media_003(): array|false { return image_resize_dimensions( 600, 300, 300, 300, false ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_media_004() to retrieve XMP image alt text metadata from a file path.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_media_004()` must retrieve XMP image alt text metadata from a file path. Review focus: Use WordPress media APIs; Do not parse attachment data manually; Load the admin image helper before calling wp_get_image_alttext. Static checks intentionally require wp_get_image_alttext, wp-admin/includes/image.php. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Do not parse attachment data manually
Load the admin image helper before calling wp_get_image_alttext

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_media_004' ) ) { return false; } $file = sys_get_temp_dir() . '/wpbp-alttext-' . wp_rand() . '.jpg'; $xmp = '<x:xmpmeta xmlns:x="adobe:ns:meta/"><rdf:RDF xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"><rdf:Description xmlns:Iptc4xmpCore="http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpCore/1.0/xmlns/"><Iptc4xmpCore:AltTextAccessibility><rdf:Alt><rdf:li xml:lang="x-default">Bench alt text</rdf:li></rdf:Alt></Iptc4xmpCore:AltTextAccessibility></rdf:Description></rdf:RDF></x:xmpmeta>'; file_put_contents( $file, 'jpg' . $xmp ); $out = wpbp_media_004( $file ); unlink( $file ); return 'Bench alt text' === $out;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_media_004( string $file ): string { require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php'; return (string) wp_get_image_alttext( $file ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_media_005() to return the mime type and extension for an upload filename.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_media_005()` must return the mime type and extension for an upload filename. Review focus: Use WordPress media APIs; Do not parse attachment data manually. Static checks intentionally require wp_check_filetype. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Do not parse attachment data manually

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_media_005' ) ) { return false; } $out = wpbp_media_005( 'photo.jpg' ); return 'jpg' === $out['ext'] && 'image/jpeg' === $out['type'];

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_media_005( string $filename ): array { return wp_check_filetype( $filename ); }
